name: staleness_min
note: Tiny built-in staleness set. Validates the staleness harness end-to-end against real memsom WITHOUT the LongMemEval download. Each item seeds a v1 fact under a stable source_ref, an answer is derived, then (for 'updated' items) the SAME source is re-ingested with a v2 fact on the SAME channel (a legitimate update, NOT external poison) -> the derived answer goes stale. 'control' items get no update and must stay fresh (precision). These prove the pipe; the headline number is the LongMemEval knowledge-update run.

items.question: Where is the team offsite being held?
items.evidence_v1: The team offsite is being held in Denver.
items.update_text: The team offsite is being held in Austin.

items.question: Who is the on-call engineer this week?
items.evidence_v1: The on-call engineer this week is Priya.
items.update_text: The on-call engineer this week is Marcus.

items.question: What is the production database version?
What is the monthly budget cap?
items.evidence_v1: The monthly budget cap is twelve thousand dollars.
items.update_text: The monthly budget cap is twenty thousand dollars.

items.question: Which vendor provides the email service?
items.evidence_v1: The email service is provided by Mailgun.
items.update_text: The email service is provided by Postmark.

items.question: What is the company founding year?
What is the office wifi network name?
items.evidence_v1: The office wifi network is named Skylab.
